metadata.description: Official plugins for FlashQuery Core to power by your AI and your data sovereignty.

plugins.name: fqc-crm
plugins.description: A CRM powered by FlashQuery Core contact management through conversation, not application.

plugins.name: fqc-base
plugins.description: Core FlashQuery skills for writing, finding, and organizing vault documents and memories, plus vault maintenance commands.

plugins.name: product-brain
plugins.description: A product knowledge management plugin — capture, organize, and synthesize product intelligence through conversation.
